Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HOutfits
Punchline: Apply full sets to your character in Glamourer with a single click.
Description: Lists the game's named outfit sets (the MirageStoreSetItem data) and applies a whole set — or any single piece — to your character through Glamourer, instead of picking each item from a dropdown. Sets and individual pieces are searchable by name. Complete named sets only; loose items that aren't part of a named set aren't listed. Requires Glamourer.
